creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Hi Helmut,

I have some for all three Makefiles the following additional changes

- s/bsd.port.pre.mk/bsd.port.options.mk/
- s/bsd.port.post.mk/bsd.port.mk/
- s/ZLIB_DESC= zlib support/d => from bsd.options.desc.mk: zlib compression support

Perhaps we can also remove the CURL_DESC and use the DESC from bsd.options.desc.mk


Additional I created a vuxml entry
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/typo3_vuxml_2013-08-05.diff

Let me know if the changes are OK for you.
